item.description:
Location: Netherlands
Description:

📍 Location: Netherlands – different projects usualy in Rotterdam area
📅 Start Date: ASAP
📄 Contract: Dutch temporary agency contract
⏳ Hours: 40 hrs/week guaranteed + possible overtime

💡 Your Tasks:

✅ Cable duct assembly (Unistrut)
✅ Dismantling steel structures when no longer needed or for relocation/replacement
✅ Securing steel components with bolts, rivets, or welding
✅ Installing metal floor & roof decking, securing flooring panels
✅ Protective tube assembly
✅ Assembling small iron constructions (stairs, fences)

🔥 What We Offer:

🏠 Free housing (single room in shared apartment)
🚗 Company car provided (or km allowance if using own car)
✈️ First & last flight paid (rotation travel at worker’s expense)
💰 Weekly salary payments
🩺 Health insurance arranged by Wanted and deducted from your growth salary
🔄 Preferred rotation: 6 weeks work / 2 weeks home (flexible)

🦺 Bring your own safety shoes (S3 over ankle), other PPE provided by Wanted, if needed

🔎 Requirements:

✔️ Conversational English required
✔️ VCA & BSN (We can help you obtain them if needed)
✔️ Driving license (Advantage)

📩 Interested? Apply now!

Countries: Netherlands

Languages: English



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] Ironworkers at WANTED Spijkenisse

item.description:
Location: Netherlands
Description:

📍 Location: Netherlands, Belgium – several projects
📅 Start Date: ASAP

✅ Unload & position steel components

item.description:
Location: Netherlands
Description:

📍 Location: Netherlands, Belgium, Gewrmany – several projects
📅 Start Date: several dates
📄 Contract: Dutch/Belgian/German temporary agency contract
⏳ Hours: 40 hrs/week guaranteed + possible overtime

✅ Advise and support management on welfare policies and responsibilities

✅ Analyze workplace safety risks and recommend improvements

✅ Conduct safety training for new and existing employees

✅ Define safety training programs and target groups

✅ Perform site visits and inspections to ensure compliance

✅ Assist in accident analysis and prevention measures

✅ Participate in safety committee meetings and advise on protective equipment and procedures

item.description:
Location: Netherlands
Description:

📍 Location: Netherlands, Belgium, Germany – several projects
📅 Start Date: several dates
📄 Contract: Dutch/Belgian/German temporary agency contract
⏳ Hours: 40 hrs/week guaranteed + possible overtime

💡 Your Tasks:

✅ Maintain accurate records of construction documents and drawings

✅ Process and QA-check large volumes of documents daily

✅ Collaborate with the Document Control and wider project team to ensure cost control and contractual integrity

✅ Identify and document discrepancies, ensuring timely resolution with the project team

✅ Develop and maintain an organized, user-friendly filing system

item.title: [Hot Job] Document Controllers at WANTED Spijkenisse

item.description:
Location: Singapore
Description:

ABOUT IFS: International Food Services (IFS) is an independently owned maritime catering organization.We offer marine catering solutions of the highest quality and monitor the consumption on board and deliveries for our clients in the shipping industry.IFS has offices in Antwerp, Singapore, Poland and Manila. We stand for a no-nonsense approach with a dedicated team, and we try to make a difference for our clients. Passion for the job and sustainable collaboration are very important for us. We aim to increase our clients' buying power by reducing waste and inefficiencies. We achieve this by training and supporting the crew on board and improving the well-being on board of the crew. ABOUT THE POSITION:We are looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented Senior Accountant team leader to join our IFS Singapore team.In this pivotal role, you will ensure the accuracy and integrity of our financial records while driving our regional closing and reporting processes. You will manage a dynamic team, where your expertise directly contributes to our global success. Key Responsibilities:

  • Closings: Lead the full spectrum of month-end and year-end closing activities for our Singapore entities.
  • Reporting: Prepare accurate and timely monthly management reports and financial statements in accordance with standards.
  • Compliance: Ensure full compliance with Singapore Financial Reporting Standards (SFRS), GST filings, and statutory audit requirements.
  • Analysis: Perform variance analysis, monitor bank balances, and provide actionable financial insights to the management team.
  • Process Improvement: Identify opportunities to optimize accounting workflows and support the implementation of financial tools.

 Your Profile:

  • Experience: At least 5 years of professional experience in accounting, with a strong focus on full-set closings and financial reporting.
  • Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Accountancy, Finance, or a related field. Professional qualifications (e.g., CPA or ACCA) are highly regarded.
  • Skills: Proficient in MS Excel and experienced with ERP systems (knowledge of Exact Globe+ or similar is a plus).
  • Mindset: A proactive, independent team player with a hands-on mentality who thrives in a dynamic international environment.
  • Communication: Excellent written and spoken English skills; maritime or F&B industry experience is an advantage.

 What We Offer:A challenging and rewarding role within a growing, international company.A professional work environment that values excellence and social responsibility.Competitive remuneration and benefits package aligned with your experience and the Singapore market. How to Apply:Are you ready to join our mission of reducing waste and delivering quality? Please send your CV and motivation letter. Acquisition based on this vacancy is not appreciated.



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] SENIOR ACCOUNTANT TEAM LEADER at International Food Service PH

item.description:
Location: Singapore
Description:

ABOUT IFS: International Food Services is an independently owned Maritime Catering Organisation. We offer Catering solutions of the highest quality and monitor the consumption on board and deliveries for our clients in the shipping industry.IFS has offices in Antwerp, Poland, Singapore and Manila. We stand for a no-nonsense approach with a dedicated team. We try to make a difference for our clients. Passion for the job and a sustainable collaboration is very important for us.We aim to increase our clients buying power by reducing waste and inefficiencies. We achieve this by training and support of the Crew on board and to improve the wellbeing on board of the crew.
ABOUT THE POSITION: IFS is growing rapidly to make sure our services are guaranteed to the clients we are looking for a Full time Training Instructor who will be responsible for training and supporting audit/stock takes and trouble shooting at our offices or on board the clients vessels.The main job would be to represent our company and to train the catering crew on our standard operating procedures and way of working. With a focus on safety, quality, variety and waste management.This includes training on cooking skills, menu planning, QHSE and another range of maritime catering standards. Within this position you will work closely together with our different departments internally such as operations,crewing and procurement as well as externally you will be in contact with our clients, catering crew, suppliers and captains to give your support where you can.Location; you would mainly give training in Belgium at our Maritime Food Lab in Antwerp.
The main tasks/responsibilities will be:

  • Conducting IFS training to Chief Cooks, stewards and camp bosses of IFS clients at the IFS office in Antwerp.
  • During the training sessions; preparing, cooking and showcasing the dishes according to the IFS scope and cooking app.
  • Conducting catering audits and stock making on board of vessels.
  • Introducing the IFS way of working on board of new catered vessels.

 What are we looking for:

  • Full Professional Proficiency in English
  • Computer literacy (MS Office, Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
  • 5+ years of working experience within the maritime catering industry
  • Solid Knowledge of Hygiene Legislation and food safety standards
  • Understanding of Health & Safety Regulations and MARPOL Guidelines
  • Cooking certification in international cuisine; additional knowledge of other cuisines is a plus
  • Good communication and organizational skills
  • Excellent Communication and Organizational Skills
  • Reliable, Flexible, and Proactive Work Ethic
  • Willingness to Work Beyond Standard Hours – no strict 9-to-5 mindset
  • Ability to Work Well Under Pressure in a fast-paced environment

 What do we offer: We offer a competitive salary including underneath benefits:

  • Flexible working hours
  • Laptop, mobile phone
  • Learning and Development opportunities

 If you are living in Belgium we also offer:

  • Hospitalization insurance
  • Eco Vouchers
  • Meal Vouchers


Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] IFS training instructor at International Food Service PH

item.description:
Location:
Description:

ABOUT IFS: 
International Food Services (IFS) is an independently owned maritime catering organization. We offer marine catering solutions of the highest quality and monitor the consumption on board and deliveries for our clients in the shipping industry. IFS has offices in Antwerp, Singapore, Poland and Manila. We stand for a no-nonsense approach with a dedicated team, and we try to make a difference for our clients. Passion for the job and sustainable collaboration are very important for us. We aim to increase our clients' buying power by reducing waste and inefficiencies. We achieve this by training and supporting the crew on board and improving the well-being on board of the crew.

ABOUT THE POSITION:
We are looking for a skilled and experienced AI Developer to join our team.The ideal candidate has a strong background in building and deploying AI solutions using Azure AI Foundry, OpenAI, and Azure Logic Apps.In this role, you will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining AI-driven applications that optimize business processes and drive innovation.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Design and Deploy AI Solutions: Build and deploy AI models and applications using Azure AI Foundry and OpenAI services.
  • Integrate AI into Business Workflows: Create and manage automated workflows by integrating AI capabilities into business processes using Azure Logic Apps.
  • Collaborate Across Teams: Work closely with software engineers and business stakeholders to gather requirements and deliver AI solutions aligned with organizational needs.
  • Optimize AI Models: Fine-tune and optimize AI models for enhanced performance, accuracy, and reliability.
  • Maintain AI Systems: Monitor AI systems to ensure high availability and scalability, troubleshoot issues and implement updates as necessary.
  • Stay Current with AI Advancements: Keep up with emerging trends in AI technologies, tools, and best practices to ensure continuous improvement and innovation.

 What are we looking for:

  • Experience: Proven experience building Agentic applications in production: RAG, tool/function calling, multi-step workflows, guardrails, and deterministic enforcement for business rules.
  • Technical skills & technologies: Programming Languages: Python Version Controls: Git
    • Cloud Platforms and Services: Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, Azure AI Foundry, Azure OpenAI, Azure Functions (HTTP APIs), Logic Apps (workflow automation)
    • AI/ML Technologies: LLMs, RAG, semantic search/embeddings, agents/tool calling, ML , Natural Language Processing (NLP), Optical Character Recognition (OCR), Speech Recognition(nice to have)
    • Frameworks and Libraries: .NET Core, Azure SDKs, experience with Angular 14+ is a plus
    • Databases and Data Management: Azure SQL Database, SQL Server, Azure Cache for Redis
  • Analytical Skills: Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to analyse complex data sets to derive actionable insights.
  • Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills (English) to effectively collaborate with team members and stakeholders.
  • Adaptability: Ability to quickly learn new technologies and adapt to changing project requirements.

 What do we offer:

  • Attractive salary and additional benefits.
  • Opportunity for development in a global company.
  • Working in an international team.

 Are you looking for a new challenge in a dynamic, international, family owned company?Don’t look any further and send your application.



Apply to this job
item.title: [Hot Job] AI Developer to join our team at International Food Service PH

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Crane Operators from Europe needed for a 4-month project in Germany. The rotation schedule is 14 days on and 14 days off with permanent payment.

If interested and available, please send your CV to crewing@lighthaus-marine.eu.
